title: potentilla multifida f. subsericea
intro: Potentilla multifida f. subsericea, also known as the five-lobed cinquefoil, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Potentilla multifida f. subsericea include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herb for skin care and first aid. Herbal preparations of Potentilla multifida f. subsericea include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
